purpose: Renders the working tree status sidebar inside Git Manager. Displays three collapsible sections — Staged Changes, Unstaged Changes, Untracked Files — each driven by gitStatus.{staged|unstaged|untracked} from AppContext. Each FileItem shows a single-letter status badge (M/A/D/R/U/C/T mapped via STATUS_MAP), a basename + dim parent dir path, and inline hover actions: stage (+), unstage (−), or discard (trash). Clicking a row dispatches GIT_SET_SELECTED_FILE and immediately fetches a per-file diff via api.gitDiffFile(repoPath, filePath, isStaged) — the isStaged flag is critical because staged and unstaged diffs are computed against different references. Provides bulk operations (Stage All / Unstage All / Discard All) in the section headers. Discard operations are gated by window.confirm — irreversible warning text is hard-coded in the prompt.
gotchas: Untracked files come in as raw strings (filePath), while staged/unstaged come as objects {path, status} — FileItem handles both shapes via isUntracked flag, do not assume uniform shape.
Discard operations use window.confirm (native dialog) NOT SafetyDialogs.jsx — this is intentional for single-file discards but inconsistent with QuickActions which uses the React-based dialogs.
The diff fetch requires the correct isStaged flag: staged diffs use `git diff --cached` semantics, unstaged use working-tree-vs-index. Passing the wrong flag returns an empty/wrong diff.
handleDiscardAll iterates with `for...of` and awaits each gitDiscardFile sequentially — this is intentional to avoid race conditions on the index but is slow for many files.
STATUS_MAP includes 'T' (type change) and 'C' (conflicted) — when extending statuses ensure both the map and the .css class names (added/modified/deleted/renamed/untracked/conflicted) stay in sync.
Selecting a file dispatches a diff, but if discard removes the currently selected file the panel manually clears GIT_SET_SELECTED_FILE and GIT_SET_DIFF — don't forget this when adding new mutations.
patterns: Three-section collapsible layout with chevron icons (ChevronIcon) and per-section open state (stagedOpen, unstagedOpen, untrackedOpen).
splitPath() helper renders the basename prominently with the parent directory in a dim suffix — typical IDE file-list pattern.
All mutations flow through refreshStatus which re-fetches gitStatus and dispatches GIT_SET_STATUS to update sibling components (CommitPanel, BranchPanel).
conventions: Section header buttons stop propagation so clicking action buttons doesn't toggle the section collapse.
Inline-styled chips/labels use var(--text-tertiary), var(--color-blocked), var(--border) tokens for theming consistency.

depends_on: electron/preload.js (gitStatus, gitDiffFile, gitStage, gitUnstage, gitDiscardFile, gitStageAll, gitUnstageAll)
